cortex.inputSignature: User request plus manifest routing matrix, available tools, memory context, and prior agent state.
cortex.outputSignature: Intent classification, selectedToolID or target slot, approval requirement, and concise routing summary.

embedding.purpose: Perform the embedding role defined by the Lumen model fleet contract.
embedding.inputSignature: Role-specific input defined by the fleet contract and AgentBehaviorManifest.
embedding.outputSignature: Role-specific output defined by the fleet contract and AgentBehaviorManifest.

executor.inputSignature: Approved Cortex plan, exact tool ID, argument candidates, permission state, and approval state.
executor.outputSignature: Strict JSON tool call, clarification request, approval request, or structured tool result.

mimicry.inputSignature: Draft response, user style hints, locale, tone preferences, and safety constraints.
mimicry.outputSignature: Style-adjusted user-facing text or style profile that preserves facts and safety boundaries.

mouth.inputSignature: Tool result, user-visible state, style profile, and safety/sentinel constraints.
mouth.outputSignature: Final user-facing text with no private reasoning, raw tool JSON, or forbidden sentinels.

rem.inputSignature: Audit failure, conversation summary, memory candidates, freshness policy, and manifest context.
rem.outputSignature: Repair sample, memory decision, freshness classification, or runtime drift recommendation.

constraints:
Mimicry v1 tone profile:
        - user state: \(state)
        - response style: \(style)
        \(rules)

cortex.input_signature: User request plus manifest routing matrix, available tools, memory context, and prior agent state.
cortex.output_signature: Intent classification, selectedToolID or target slot, approval requirement, and concise routing summary.

embedding.purpose: Perform the embedding role defined by the Lumen model fleet contract.
embedding.input_signature: Role-specific input defined by the fleet contract and AgentBehaviorManifest.
embedding.output_signature: Role-specific output defined by the fleet contract and AgentBehaviorManifest.

executor.input_signature: Approved Cortex plan, exact tool ID, argument candidates, permission state, and approval state.
executor.output_signature: Strict JSON tool call, clarification request, approval request, or structured tool result.

mimicry.input_signature: Draft response, user style hints, locale, tone preferences, and safety constraints.
mimicry.output_signature: Style-adjusted user-facing text or style profile that preserves facts and safety boundaries.

mouth.input_signature: Tool result, user-visible state, style profile, and safety/sentinel constraints.
mouth.output_signature: Final user-facing text with no private reasoning, raw tool JSON, or forbidden sentinels.

rem.input_signature: Audit failure, conversation summary, memory candidates, freshness policy, and manifest context.
rem.output_signature: Repair sample, memory decision, freshness classification, or runtime drift recommendation.
